_about: Hand-localized fixed copy for the scorecard (ADR 0009). Tiers are high->low. The 'title'/personality summary paragraph is NOT here — the model writes it in the user's language (ADR 0008 D3).

zh.local_privacy_note: 全部分析在你本地完成，prompt 内容不离开你的机器
zh.estimate_note: 排名为本地估算，仅供娱乐

en.local_privacy_note: Analyzed entirely on your machine — your prompts never leave it.
en.estimate_note: Ranking is a local estimate, just for fun.

tiers.zh_roast: 你的 prompt 像手术刀，一句话直达需求
tiers.en_roast: Your prompts are a scalpel — one line, straight to the point.

tiers.zh_roast: 偶尔啰嗦，但基本一击即中
tiers.en_roast: A little wordy, but you usually land it first try.
Gets there — just a few too many words.

tiers.zh_roast: 同一个需求换三种说法说给 AI 听
tiers.en_roast: You pitch the same ask to the AI three different ways.

tiers.zh_roast: 祈祷 AI 能读懂你的心
tiers.en_roast: You cast a vibe and pray the AI reads your mind.

tiers.zh_roast: 花得少干得多，刀刀见血
tiers.en_roast: Spends little, ships a lot — every token earns its keep.

tiers.zh_roast: 该花花该省省，账单很健康
tiers.en_roast: Spends where it matters. Healthy bill.

tiers.zh_roast: 拿最贵的模型干最简单的活
tiers.en_roast: Summoning Opus to fix a typo.

tiers.zh_roast: 稳扎稳打，该测的都测了
tiers.en_roast: Steady hands — tests where they matter.

tiers.zh_roast: 一个 session 跨三个无关项目，git diff 看不懂自己干了啥
tiers.en_roast: One session, three unrelated projects — you can't read your own git diff.
Clocks in daily. Even the AI needs a break.

tiers.zh_roast: 早 9 晚 9，深夜还在改 bug
准点下班，周末不碰键盘
tiers.en_roast: Logs off on time. Weekends are sacred.
